scripts.dev: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }" & next dev -p 3000
scripts.cap:build: powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Recurse -Force app/api ../_api_backup; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force app/api; Copy-Item middleware.ts middleware.ts.bak; Remove-Item middleware.ts; try { npm run build:cap } finally { Copy-Item -Recurse -Force ../_api_backup app/api; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ../_api_backup; Copy-Item middleware.ts.bak middleware.ts; Remove-Item middleware.ts.bak }" && npx cap sync
